raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased an international airline ticket from XXXX XXXX for travel from XXXX to XXXX. The charge of approximately {$640.00} was placed on my Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX credit card. 

Due to a significant snowstorm impacting travel conditions, I contacted XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> to request cancellation and to inquire about available weather waivers or refund eligibility. The representative informed me that no refund or credit would be issued and did not provide a clear explanation of the applicable fare rules or any review of potential policy exceptions. 

I attempted to resolve this matter directly with the airline but was not provided meaningful assistance or escalation. I believe the merchant has not properly evaluated refund eligibility under its published policies or applicable consumer protections. 

I am requesting that the credit card issuer review this dispute and determine whether the charge should be reversed if the merchant is unwilling to provide appropriate relief. 

Confirmation : XXXX - XXXX XXXX XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX
